title: toona sinensis var. puberula
intro: Toona sinensis var. puberula, also known as Chinese mahogany or toon, is a plant species that belongs to the mahogany family (Meliaceae). It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Toona sinensis var. puberula are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
